name: Calculateur d'Intérêt Simple
desc: Calculez les intérêts et le capital final avec intérêt simple.
description: Calculez les intérêts et le capital final avec intérêt simple.
seo_title: Calculateur Intérêt Simple Gratuit en Ligne

example_label: Calculating simple interest on €8,at 4.25% annual rate over 4.years.
result_context: The intereses of {intereses} is the Total interest earned. Your capital_final of {capital_final} includes both principal and interest.
steps: {'step': 3, 'description': 'Add interest to principal for Final amount', 'calculetion': '€8,500 + €1,625.63 = €10,125.63'}
mistakes: Using compound interest formule when simple interest applies (short-term loans)
Forgetting to convert percentage to decimal before calculetion
Confusing simple interest with compound interest for savings accounts
